sections.paragraph:
m. Chald.-

(1) time; Syriac ܥܶܕܳܢ, Arabic عَدَّانُ id.; from the root עָדַד Dan 2:8, seq.; 3:5 , 15 7:12 .

(2) . specially a year, Dan 4:13, 20 , 22 , 29 7:25 , עַד־עִדָּן וְעִדָּנִין וּפְּלַג עִדָּן “during a year, (two) years, and the half of a year;” i.e. during three years and a half; comp. Josephus, Bellum Jud. i. 1 . See מֹועֵד No. 2 , and יָמִים No. 4 .
